mapper.select: SELECT id, name, current_max, step, version, updated_time FROM counters WHERE name = #{name} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO counters(name, current_max, step, version, updated_time) SELECT #{name}, 0, #{step}, 0, NOW() WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM counters WHERE name = #{name})
mapper.update: UPDATE counters SET current_max = current_max + #{step}, version = version + 1, updated_time = NOW() WHERE name = #{name} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
